'''Slash Bash''' is an [[Undead (attribute)|undead]] [[ourg]] encountered during the [[Zogre Flesh Eaters]] quest. He uses both [[melee]] and [[ranged]] attacks. It is vital to have [[Relicym's balm]] (note that [[Sanfew serum]] does not cure Slash Bash's disease), and at least [[swordfish]] or better when fighting him, as the [[disease]] can drain stats by up to 15. He is very difficult as he can drain your [[prayer]] and switch between devastating range and powerful melee. However, it is possible to use [[magic]] or [[ranged]] from behind the stand or a stack of bones, and then he can only damage the player using range.

[[Brutal arrow]]s and the [[Crumble Undead]] spell are his weakness. Other attacks, such as melee, will be futile, as they can only hit up to 25% of the normal max hit (for example, up to 5 if a player normally hits up to 20) on Slash Bash. Taking too long to kill Slash Bash will cause him to disappear, forcing a player to fight him again.

It is possible to safespot him using brutal arrows or the Crumble Undead spell. Using [[Protect from Missiles]] with this method will reduce the damage taken to 0. 
[[File:Fighting Slash Bash.png|thumb|left|A player fights Slash Bash.]]

==History==
Slash Bash was an [[ourg]] warrior in the service of [[Bandos]] during the [[God Wars]]. Very little is known about his life, but according to [[General Graardor]] he took part in a mission to corner [[Zamorak]]. The mission failed and Slash Bash was killed and later buried in the ancient burial ground of [[Jiggig]].{{CitePostbag|issue=28|letter=Letter 7|author=General Graardor}} His corpse would remain there for millennia until [[Sithik Ints]] had [[Brentle Vahn]] assist him in cursing Jiggig causing Slash Bash and hundreds of [[skogre]]s and [[zogre]]s to be reanimated. 

{{OccDur|Zogre Flesh Eaters}}
Following the curse, the [[ogre]] shaman [[Grish]] asked an [[player character|adventurer]] to help them create a new sacred burial ground requiring an ancient [[ogre artefact]], which now was in the possession of the undead Slash Bash. This led to the adventurer fighting against the undead ourg using techniques they had learned to fend off undead ogres and keeping their [[disease]] at bay. Successfully slaying Slash Bash, the adventurer returned the artefact to the ogres.

==Trivia==
*Slash Bash appears to be wearing the artefact the player is sent to retrieve on his head, which explains why he drops it when he dies.
*Slash Bash might be a reference to the {{WP|PlayStation (console)|PlayStation}} game "{{WP|Crash Bash}}".
*The ourg boss was due to be called "Gash Bash" in an early design draft of Zogre Flesh Eaters, before a tester pointed out the colloquial meaning of the phrase.{{CiteTwitter|author=Mod Ash|url=https://twitter.com/JagexAsh/status/1047045622333890560|date=2 October 2018|archiveurl=https://reldo.runescape.wiki/i/97026|archivedate=10 January 2023|quote=On a related subject, the Slash Bash boss from Zogre Flesh Eaters was originally going to be called "Gash Bash" in the first design draft, until the tester explained that this meant something.}}
*According to [[General Graardor]] in the [[Transcript:Bryophyta, Tarn Razorlor and more|Postbag from the Hedge #28]], Slash Bash was a "coward" who fell in battle before the Bandosians could corner Zamorak.
